title: Interactive Brokers Group to Present at Barclays Global Financial Services Conference
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #Earnings--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) announces that its Chairman Thomas Peterffy will speak at the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference on Tuesday, September 12th at 9:00 a.m. ET. Mr. Peterffy's presentation can be heard live via webcast on the Internet accessible from the company's website, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir-events. Participants should log in approximately 10 minutes prior to the start of the presentation. A replay will also be.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for July 2023, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #IBKR--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for July. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 1.991 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 9% higher than prior year and 2% higher than prior month. Ending client equity of $386.2 billion, 23% higher than prior year and 6% higher than prior month. Ending client margin loan balances of $43.2 b.

title: Interactive Brokers Introduces Fractional Shares Trading in Canadian Stocks and ETFs
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR) today announced the launch of fractional shares trading for Canadian stocks and ETFs.
